name: Boss firing me after injury in Bountiful, is that legal?

mainEntity.name: Boss firing me after injury in Bountiful, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; file wrongful termination suit.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, retaliation for filing workers' comp is illegal in Utah; you can sue for wrongful termination.**[5]

Utah protects against discharge due to injury claims. Prove timing and causal link.

- Document performance pre/post-injury.
- File retaliation claim separately.
- Damages include back pay, reinstatement.

Report to Labor Commission. Lawyer essential for proof.

description: Illegal retaliation; file wrongful termination suit.[5]
